task_completion.description: Navigate to the Minimum Order Amount configuration section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The admin panel shows the 'Minimum Order Amount' configuration section expanded, typically under Stores > Configuration > Sales > Sales.

task_completion.description: Enable the Minimum Order Amount policy
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Enable' dropdown field in the Minimum Order Amount section is set to 'Yes'.

task_completion.description: Set the minimum order amount to 35.00
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Minimum Amount' input field contains the value '35.00'.

task_completion.description: Configure tax and discount inclusion settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Include Tax to Amount' dropdown is set to 'Yes' and the 'Include Discount Amount' dropdown is set to 'No'.
The 'Description Message' text area contains exactly: 'Orders must be at least $35.00 to qualify for fulfillment.'
The 'Error to Show in Shopping Cart' text area contains exactly: 'Your order is under $35.00. Please add more items to checkout.'
A success message (e.g., 'You saved the configuration.') is visible at the top of the admin panel after clicking the Save Config button.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser GUI to configure the settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser interface (e.g., clicking dropdowns, typing in text fields) rather than executing terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual store admin panel
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface is a genuine e-commerce admin panel (Magento), not a local text editor or a mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a database client or terminal to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots showing SQL queries, database management tools, or terminal commands being used to alter the configuration directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Minimum Order Amount policy must be Enabled (Yes). The Minimum Amount must be exactly '35.00'. Include Tax to Amount must be 'Yes'. Include Discount Amount must be 'No'. The Description Message must be exactly 'Orders must be at least $35.00 to qualify for fulfillment.'. The Error to Show in Shopping Cart must be exactly 'Your order is under $35.00. Please add more items to checkout.'.
